results.title: Opine uses AI to automate sales tasks but says human sellers aren't going anywhere
results.description: Opine has raised $5M and hit seven-figure ARR automating admin work for technical sales teams. Its AI agents save an average of four hours per week per active deal on tasks like tracking requirements and chasing spreadsheet updates.

results.title: NYT ‘Pips’ Hints, Answers And Walkthrough For Saturday, June 6
results.description: Looking for help with today's New York Times Pips? We'll walk you through today's puzzle and help you match dominoes to tiles.
